title: CandleRuntime LoRA mount for transformer models (PEFT-style adapter)
goal: Implement LoraStackOps for CandleRuntime's Transformer variant: mount a PEFT LoRA (safetensors with lora_A/lora_B per target module) and apply during forward pass. Hot-swap without rebuilding the base model. Per AC-CANDLE-ADAPTER and operator E-3.
expected_diff_shape: New src/backend/handshake_core/src/model_runtime/candle/lora_impl.rs with CandleLoraStack + LoraAdapter (Tensor pairs per target module); transformer.rs forward wrapping to apply LoRA delta; tests.
unblock_conditions: MT-064 LoraStackOps trait + MT-083 transformer load/generate merged.
implementation_notes: PEFT LoRA convention: safetensors file with tensors named `<target_module>.lora_A.weight` shape [r, in_dim] and `<target_module>.lora_B.weight` shape [out_dim, r] for each target_module in {q_proj, k_proj, v_proj, o_proj, gate_proj, up_proj, down_proj, ...}. CandleLoraAdapter: `{ id: LoraId, target_modules: HashMap<String, (Tensor /*A*/, Tensor /*B*/)>, rank: u32, scaling: f32 (alpha/rank) }`. Forward wrapping: in transformer.rs, each Linear layer named in target_modules computes `y = base.forward(x) + scaling * strength * (B @ (A @ x))`. CandleLoraStack: HashMap<LoraId, CandleLoraAdapter> + active set Vec<(LoraId, LoraStrength)>; forward iterates active stack and accumulates LoRA deltas. mount: load safetensors, validate target_modules against the loaded model's layer names (mismatch -> Err with explicit list of missing/extra), insert into stack, return Ok. unmount: remove from active set + stack. set_strength: update active set entry. swap: atomic build new stack + active set; on any mount failure roll back to snapshot. Tests (env-gated, requires a small Llama base + a small LoRA safetensors): mount, generate, verify output differs from base; unmount, output reverts; mount LoRA targeting nonexistent module returns Err with module list; license_tag enforced. No process restart (PID invariant test).
risk_if_missed: LoRA hot-swap missing CandleRuntime path; activation-hook models cannot accept LoRAs; INF-1 partial.
validator_focus: Target-module validation mismatch returns explicit Err; atomic swap rollback; PID invariant test; license tag enforced.

minimum_controls: Target-module mismatch returns explicit Err with list (no silent skip).
PID invariant test (no process restart on mount/unmount/swap).
Atomic swap rollback on partial failure.
